'''Brodan''' was a [[Droid/Legends|droid]] parts manufactuer that produced the [[RBY Data Collection Scanning Head]] and [[Triple-Opposing Midweight Pincher]].<ref name="DroidWorks" />

==Behind the scenes==
Brodan was first mentioned in ''[[Star Wars: DroidWorks]]'', a [[1998]] [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] [[Wikipedia:Educational entertainment|educational]] video game developed and published by [[Lucas Learning]] for [[Wikipedia:Personal computer|PC]] and [[Wikipedia:Mac (computer)|Mac]].<ref name="DroidWorks" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: DroidWorks]]'' {{1stm}}
